revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=山津照神社| 所在地=滋賀県米原市近江町能登瀬390| 祭神=國常立尊| 社格=式内社
県社| 創建=創祀年代不詳| 例祭=[[5月5日]]| 神事=}} '''山津照神社'''（やまつてるじんじゃ）は[[滋賀県]][[米原市]]にある[[神社]]である。 ==ご祭神== *[[国常立尊]] ==ご神紋== 菊・桐 ==歴史== 創祀年代不詳。[[延喜式神名帳]]に記載されている[[式内社]]である。[[仁寿]]元年正六位、[[貞観]]8年正四位下の神階を賜ったという記録が残る。[[明治]]14年郷社、[[大正]]10年に県社に列格した。 境内には古墳群があり、県史跡に指定されている。 ==祭事== 例祭　　5月5日 ==境内社== * 青木神社 * 若宮八幡神社 * 春日社 * 北野社 == 関連項目 == *[[神道]] *[[神社]] {{DEFAULTSORT:やまつてるしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:米原市]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:府県社]] {{Shinto-stub}}

{{神社 |名称 = 山津照神社 |画像 = |所在地 = 滋賀県米原市近江町能登瀬390 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|19|49.7|N|136|19|21.4|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = 國常立尊 |社格 = 式内社・旧県社 |創建 = 創祀年代不詳 |本殿 = [[流造|三間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[5月5日]] |神事 = }}
'''山津照神社'''（やまつてるじんじゃ）は[[滋賀県]][[米原市]]にある[[神社]]である。
==祭神== *[[国常立尊]]
==神紋== 菊・桐
==歴史== 創祀年代不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載されている[[式内社]]である。[[仁寿]]元年（[[851年]]）正六位、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]8年（[[866年]]）正四位下の[[神階]]を賜ったという記録が残る。[[明治]]14年（[[1881年]]）[[郷社]]、[[大正]]10年（[[1921年]]）に[[県社]]に列格した。
境内には古墳群があり、県史跡に指定されている。
==祭事== 例祭 5月5日
==境内社== * 青木神社 * 若宮八幡神社 * 春日社 * 北野社
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 山津照神社]（滋賀県神社庁）
{{DEFAULTSORT:やまつてるしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:府県社]] [[Category:米原市]] {{Shinto-stub}}

'''山津照神社'''（やまつてるじんじゃ）は[[滋賀県]][[米原市]]にある[[神社]]である。
==祭神== *[[国常立尊]]
==神紋== 菊・桐
==歴史== 創祀年代不詳。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載されている[[式内社]]である。[[仁寿]]元年（[[851年]]）正六位、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]8年（[[866年]]）正四位下の[[神階]]を賜ったという記録が残る。[[明治]]14年（[[1881年]]）[[郷社]]、[[大正]]10年（[[1921年]]）に[[県社]]に列格した。
境内には古墳（[[山津照神社古墳]]）があり、県史跡に指定されている。
==祭事== 例祭 5月5日
==境内社== * 青木神社 * 若宮八幡神社 * 春日社 * 北野社
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 山津照神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:やまつてるしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧県社]] [[Category:米原市の歴史]] [[Category:米原市の建築物]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox Shinto shrine | name = Yamatsuteru Jinja | image = [[File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, haiden.jpg|280px]]
Haiden (worship hall) | location = [[Notose, Maibara, Shiga|Notose, Maibara]], [[Shiga Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{coord|35|19|49.7|N|136|19|21.4|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deities = [[Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] | founded = Unknown | main_building= [[Nagare-zukuri|Three-bay Nagare-zukuri]] | status = [[Shikinaisha|Shikinaisha]] (minor)
Former [[Prefectural shrine]] | festivals = [[May 5]] }} '''Yamatsuteru Jinja''' (山津照神社) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Notose, Maibara, Shiga|Notose]], [[Maibara City]], [[Shiga Prefecture]], Japan. It is listed as a [[Shikinaisha]] in the ''[[Engishiki]]'' and held the status of a [[Prefectural shrine]] under the [[State Shinto|modern shrine ranking system]]. Its emblem features chrysanthemum and paulownia motifs. == Enshrined Deities == * [[Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The exact founding date of the shrine is unknown. Yamatsuteru Jinja is recognized as a [[Shikinaisha]], as listed in the ''[[Engishiki Jinmyocho]]''. It is said to enshrine a spirit brought from Hozan Shrine in [[Echizen Province]]. According to historical records, the shrine received divine rankings of Senior Sixth Rank in [[851]] (Ninjū 1) and Senior Fourth Rank in [[866]] (Jōgan 8). In the [[Meiji period]], the shrine was designated as a [[Gōsha]] (village shrine) in [[1881]] and elevated to a [[Prefectural shrine]] in [[1921]]. == Grounds == The shrine grounds feature the [[Yamatsuteru Jinja Kofun]], an ancient burial mound designated as a Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Main shrine building (''honden'') File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Central gate (''chūmon'') File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|[[Yamatsuteru Jinja Kofun]] (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii gate == Auxiliary Shrines == * Aoki Shrine * Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine * Kasuga Shrine * Kitano Shrine == Annual Festival == * The main festival is held annually on [[May 5]]. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Jinja] - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association (Japanese) {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yamatsuteru Jinja}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Historic sites in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Former prefectural shrines]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[ja:山津照神社]]

File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Main shrine building (''honden'') File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Central gate (''chūmon'') File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|[[Yamatsuteru Jinja Kofun]] (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii gate == Auxiliary Shrines == * Aoki Shrine * Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine * Kasuga Shrine * Kitano Shrine == Annual Festival == * The main festival is held annually on [[May 5]]. == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Jinja] - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Association (Japanese) {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Yamatsuteru Jinja}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Historic sites in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Ken-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:pp]] [[category:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[Category:pp]] [[Category:original pages]] [[category:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[category:original pages]] [[Category:refreshing the redirects]] [[ja:山津照神社]]

{{Shrine |Name = Yamatsuteru Shrine |Image = [[File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, haiden.jpg|280px]]
Haiden |Location = {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}, {{ill|Maibara City|ja|米原市}} Notose 390 |Coordinates = {{coord|35|19|49.7|N|136|19|21.4|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Deity = {{ill|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto|ja|国常立尊}} |Rank = {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} |Founded = Unknown |Main_Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = {{ill|May 5|ja|5月5日}} |Rituals = }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Maibara City|ja|米原市}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}}, with its former shrine rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} under the modern shrine ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == Enshrined Deity == * {{ill|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto|ja|国常立尊}} == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社}} in {{ill|Echizen Province|ja|越前国}}. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth rank (''Juroku-i'') in {{ill|Ninju|ja|仁寿}} 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth rank (''Jushi-i'') in {{ill|Jogan|ja|貞観}} 8 (866 CE). In the {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治時代}}, the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳}}, an ancient burial mound designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. Haiden |location = {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}, {{ill|Maibara City|ja|米原市}} Notose 390 |coordinates = {{coord|35|19|49.7|N|136|19|21.4|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto|ja|国常立尊}} |Rank = {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = {{ill|May 5|ja|5月5日}} |Rituals = }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Maibara City|ja|米原市}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}}, with its former shrine rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} under the modern shrine ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * {{ill|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto|ja|国常立尊}} == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社}} in {{ill|Echizen Province|ja|越前国}}. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth rank (''Juroku-i'') in {{ill|Ninju|ja|仁寿}} 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth rank (''Jushi-i'') in {{ill|Jogan|ja|貞観}} 8 (866 CE). In the {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治時代}}, the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社}} * {{ill|Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ({{ill|May 5|ja|5月5日}}) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Historical sites in Maibara]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Maibara]] [[Category:Shikinai shrines in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former prefectural shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:dd]][[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]][[Category:qq]]

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Yamatsuteru Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, haiden.jpg|280px]]
Haiden |location = {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}, {{ill|Maibara City|ja|米原市}} Notose 390 |coordinates = {{coord|35|19|49.7|N|136|19|21.4|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto|ja|国常立尊}} |Rank = {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造}} (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = {{ill|May 5|ja|5月5日}} |Rituals = }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Maibara City|ja|米原市}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinai-sha|ja|式内社}}, with its former shrine rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} under the modern shrine ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * {{ill|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto|ja|国常立尊}} == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社}} in {{ill|Echizen Province|ja|越前国}}. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth rank (''Juroku-i'') in {{ill|Ninju|ja|仁寿}} 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth rank (''Jushi-i'') in {{ill|Jogan|ja|貞観}} 8 (866 CE). In the {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治時代}}, the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社}} * {{ill|Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ({{ill|May 5|ja|5月5日}}) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Historical sites in Maibara]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Maibara]] [[Category:Shikinai shrines in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former prefectural shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:11]] [[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:Pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Pages of uncertain originality]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yamatsuteru Shrine}}{{citation needed|Yamatsuteru Shrine}}

revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 山津照神社 |画像 = [[File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, haiden.jpg|280px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[米原市]]能登瀬390 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|19|49.7|N|136|19|21.4|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[国常立尊]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
旧[[県社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = [[流造|三間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[5月5日]] |神事 = }} '''山津照神社'''（やまつてるじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[米原市]]能登瀬にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[県社]]。神紋は菊・桐。 == 祭神 == *[[国常立尊]]{{Cite web|和書|url= https://www.city.maibara.lg.jp/material/files/group/47/01.pdf|title=息長氏の秘宝 山津照神社古墳とその周辺|publisher=米原市|date=2008-03-01|accessdate=2025-04-15|page=14}} == 歴史 == [[767年]]に[[息長氏]]が祖先を祀って創建されたという。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載されている[[式内社]]である。越前国の帆山神社の分霊と伝わる。[[仁寿]]元年（[[851年]]）正六位、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]8年（[[866年]]）正四位下の[[神階]]を賜ったという記録が残る。 [[明治]]14年（[[1881年]]）[[郷社]]、[[大正]]10年（[[1921年]]）に[[県社]]に列格した。 == 境内 == 境内には古墳（[[山津照神社古墳]]）があり、県史跡に指定されている。 File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|本殿 File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|中門 File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|[[山津照神社古墳]]（滋賀県指定史跡） File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|鳥居 == 摂末社 == * 青木神社 * 若宮八幡神社 * 春日社 * 北野社 == 祭事 == * 例祭（[[5月5日]]） == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 山津照神社] - 滋賀県神社庁 {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:やまつてるしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:米原市の歴史]] [[Category:米原市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧県社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 山津照神社 |画像 = [[File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, haiden.jpg|280px]]
拝殿 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[米原市]]能登瀬390 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|19|49.7|N|136|19|21.4|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[国常立尊]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（小）
旧[[県社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = [[流造|三間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = [[5月5日]] |神事 = }} '''山津照神社'''（やまつてるじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[米原市]]能登瀬にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]で、[[近代社格制度|旧社格]]は[[県社]]。神紋は菊・桐。 == 祭神 == *[[国常立尊]]{{Cite web|和書|url= https://www.city.maibara.lg.jp/material/files/group/47/01.pdf|title=息長氏の秘宝 山津照神社古墳とその周辺|publisher=米原市|date=2008-03-01|accessdate=2025-04-15|page=14}} == 歴史 == [[767年]]に[[息長氏]]が祖先を祀って創建されたという。『[[延喜式神名帳]]』に記載されている[[式内社]]である。越前国の帆山神社の分霊と伝わる。[[仁寿]]元年（[[851年]]）正六位、[[貞観 (日本)|貞観]]8年（[[866年]]）正四位下の[[神階]]を賜ったという記録が残る。 [[明治]]14年（[[1881年]]）[[郷社]]、[[大正]]10年（[[1921年]]）に[[県社]]に列格した。 == 境内 == 境内には古墳（[[山津照神社古墳]]）があり、県史跡に指定されている。 File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|本殿 File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|中門 File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|[[山津照神社古墳]]（滋賀県指定史跡） File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|鳥居 == 摂末社 == * 青木神社 * 若宮八幡神社 * 春日社 * 北野社 == 祭事 == * 例祭（[[5月5日]]） - 武家奴振り（ぶけやっこぶり）が行われる。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 山津照神社] - 滋賀県神社庁 {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:やまつてるしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:米原市の歴史]] [[Category:米原市の建築物]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧県社]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Yamatsuteru Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, haiden.jpg|280px]]
Haiden |location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]] Notose 390 |coordinates = {{coord|35|19|49.7|N|136|19|21.4|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuni-no-Tokotachi]] |Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = [[:en:May 5|May 5]] |Rituals = }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|qq=}}, with its former shrine Rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji era|qq=}}, the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|qq=}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山津照神社|version=104506930|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Historical sites in Maibara]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Maibara]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[ja:山津照神社]]

The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=}} in 1881. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 春日大社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 北野天満宮}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山津照神社|version=104506930|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] {{Commons category|Yamatsuteru-jinja}}

The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#District_shrine|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=春日大社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=北野天満宮}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山津照神社|version=104506930|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] {{Commons category|Yamatsuteru-jinja}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11469988]] Wikidata name: Yamatsuteru-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:26, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Yamatsuteru Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Yamatuteru jinja honden.JPG |location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]] Notose 390 |coordinates = {{Coord|35.330472|N|136.322611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuni-no-Tokotachi]] |Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = [[:en:May 5|May 5]] |Rituals = |prefecture= {{ill|Maihara|qid=Q824020}} |architecture_style= {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684}} }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, with its former shrine Rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=春日大社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=北野天満宮|1=Kitano Tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山津照神社|version=104506930|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] {{Commons category|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} [[Category:qq]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11469988]] Wikidata name: Yamatsuteru-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:26, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Yamatsuteru Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Yamatuteru jinja honden.JPG |location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]] Notose 390 |coordinates = {{Coord|35.330472|N|136.322611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuni-no-Tokotachi]] |Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = [[:en:May 5|May 5]] |Rituals = |prefecture= {{ill|Maihara|qid=Q824020}} |architecture_style= {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684}} }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, with its former shrine Rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=春日大社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=北野天満宮|1=Kitano Tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山津照神社|version=104506930|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] {{Commons category|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]

File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=春日大社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=北野天満宮|1=Kitano Tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山津照神社|version=104506930|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] {{Commons category|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11469988]] Wikidata name: Yamatsuteru-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:26, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Yamatsuteru Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Yamatuteru jinja honden.JPG |location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]] Notose 390 |coordinates = {{Coord|35.330472|N|136.322611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuni-no-Tokotachi]] |Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = [[:en:May 5|May 5]] |Rituals = |prefecture= {{ill|Maihara|qid=Q824020}} |architecture_style= {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684}} }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, with its former shrine Rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=春日大社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=北野天満宮|1=Kitano Tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山津照神社|version=104506930|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] {{Commons category|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11469988]] Wikidata name: Yamatsuteru-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:26, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Yamatsuteru Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Yamatuteru jinja honden.JPG |location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]] Notose 390 |coordinates = {{Coord|35.330472|N|136.322611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuni-no-Tokotachi]] |Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = [[:en:May 5|May 5]] |Rituals = |prefecture= {{ill|Maihara|qid=Q824020}} |architecture_style= {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684}} }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, with its former shrine Rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=春日大社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=北野天満宮|1=Kitano Tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山津照神社|version=104506930|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] {{Commons category|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11469988]] Wikidata name: Yamatsuteru-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:26, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Yamatsuteru Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Yamatuteru jinja honden.JPG |location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]] Notose 390 |coordinates = {{Coord|35.330472|N|136.322611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuni-no-Tokotachi]] |Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = [[:en:May 5|May 5]] |Rituals = |prefecture= {{ill|Maihara|qid=Q824020}} |architecture_style= {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684}} }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, with its former shrine Rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=春日大社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=北野天満宮|1=Kitano Tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山津照神社|version=104506930|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[sn:Yamatsuteru Shrine]] [[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] {{Commons category|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11469988]] Wikidata name: Yamatsuteru-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:26, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Yamatsuteru Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Yamatuteru jinja honden.JPG |location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]] Notose 390 |coordinates = {{Coord|35.330472|N|136.322611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuni-no-Tokotachi]] |Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = [[:en:May 5|May 5]] |Rituals = |prefecture= {{ill|Maihara|qid=Q824020}} |architecture_style= {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684}} }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, with its former shrine Rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=春日大社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=北野天満宮|1=Kitano Tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = [[:en:May 5|May 5]] |Rituals = |prefecture= {{ill|Maihara|qid=Q824020}} |architecture_style= {{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684}} }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, with its former shrine Rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|qid=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|qid=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. [[sn:commons:Category:Yamatsuteru-jinja]][[ja:山津照神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11469988]] Wikidata name: Yamatsuteru-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:26, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Yamatsuteru Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Yamatuteru jinja honden.JPG |location = [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]], [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]] Notose 390 |coordinates = {{Coord|35.330472|N|136.322611|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |deity = [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuni-no-Tokotachi]] |Rank = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} (minor)
Former {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} |consecration_year = Unknown |Main_Hall = [[:en:Nagare-zukuri|Nagare-zukuri]] (Three-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage = |Annual_Festival = [[:en:May 5|May 5]] |Rituals = |prefecture= {{ill|Maihara|WD=Q824020}} |architecture_style= {{ill|nagare-zukuri|WD=Q210684}} }} '''Yamatsuteru Shrine''' (山津照神社, ''Yamatsuteru-jinja'') is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Maibara, Shiga|Maibara City]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. It is a listed {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, with its former shrine Rank classified as a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} under the modern shrine Ranking system. The shrine's crest (''kamon'') features chrysanthemums and paulownias. == deity == * [[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuninotokotachi no Mikoto]] == History == The shrine's founding date is unknown. It is recorded in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} as a listed shrine (''shikinai-sha'') and is said to enshrine a divided spirit from {{ill|Hoyama Shrine|ja|帆山神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hoyama Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} in [[:en:Echizen Province|Echizen Province]]. Historical records state that the shrine was awarded the sixth Rank (''Juroku-i'') in [[:en:Ninju|Ninju]] 1 (851 CE) and promoted to fourth Rank (''Jushi-i'') in [[:en:Zhenguan|Jogan]] 8 (866 CE). In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1881. It was later promoted to a {{ill|Prefectural Shrine|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefectural Shrine|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1921. == Grounds == The shrine precincts include the {{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}}, an ancient Kofun designated as a Shiga Prefectural Historic Site. File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-2.jpg|Honden File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, honden-1.jpg|Chūmon (middle gate) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja Kofun, funkyu-1.jpg|{{ill|Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|ja|山津照神社古墳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamatsuteru Shrine Kofun|qq=}} (Shiga Prefectural Historic Site) File:Yamatsuteru-jinja, torii.jpg|Torii == Associated Shrines == * {{ill|Aoki Shrine|ja|青木神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aoki Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|ja|若宮八幡神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine|qq=}} * {{ill|Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga-taisha|lt=Kasuga Shrine|ja|春日社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=春日大社}} * {{ill|Kitano Shrine|ja|北野社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=北野天満宮|1=Kitano Tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q662176}} == Annual Rituals == * festival ([[:en:May 5|May 5]]) == External Links == {{Commonscat|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1050 Yamatsuteru Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Office] {{Shinto horizontal}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|山津照神社|version=104506930|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Omi Province]] [[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:山津照神社]] [[Category:Buildings in Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:History of Maibara, Shiga]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] {{Commons category|Yamatsuteru-jinja}} {{wikidata link|Q11469988}}

In the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], the shrine was designated a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} in 1881.
